title: Easy American Vermicelli Casserole
description: A classic, comforting American dish featuring vermicelli pasta, slow-cooked to perfection with a plant-based twist, this casserole is sure to satisfy your cravings for a nostalgic, cheesy meal. It is a great option for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms in olive oil until tender.
Add the vegan ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Stir in the marinara sauce and bring the mixture to a simmer.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked vermicelli pasta, the sauce mixture, and the vegan mozzarella shreds.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional vegan mozzarella shreds if desired.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
